case_title: ALEJANDRO OCHOA VS. LE CLUB, LLC., A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY

docket_entries.description: ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO ASSIGNEE LABOR COMMISSIONER, STATE OF CALIFORNIA

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OCHOA, ALEJANDRO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LE CLUB, LLC., A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY $4,072.80 PRINCIPAL, $10.04 INTEREST, $205.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,287.84, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
